def: One of several species of sea birds, of the familyprocellariidæ, allied to the albatrosses and petrels. Among the well-known species are the arctic fulmar (Fulmarus glacialis) (called alsofulmar petrel, malduck, and mollemock), and the giant fulmar(Ossifraga gigantea).
A bed of earth heated by fermenting manure or other substances,and covered with glass, intended for raising early plants, or fornourishing exotics.
Of or pertaining to the sternum and the hyoid bone orcartilage.
A kind of high shoe anciently worn. [Written also moyle.]
A mineral usually of a reddish brown color, and brilliantmetallic adamantine luster, occurring in tetragonal crystals. Incomposition it is titanium dioxide, like octahedrite and brooklite.
An ornamental and diversified arrangement of beds or plots, inwhich flowers are cultivated, with intervening spaces of gravel orturf for walking on.
To conform, or cause to conform, to the religion of Islam.
